channel.title: Muhammad Hamza's Blog
channel.description: Articles on software engineering, AI/ML, and building products like Quizior, JARVIS, and more — written by Muhammad Hamza.

item.title: Inside Quizior: How I Built a Free, Real-Time MCQ Quiz Platform
item.description: Muhammad Hamza breaks down how Quizior lets you generate up to 100 MCQs instantly, extract 350+ questions from Word/Excel files, and run live, leaderboard-driven quizzes for classrooms and competitions — completely free.
